sourceCode: _pretenured_2850078_next	"Read the next record.	I will return an instance of recordClass."	^ recordClassIsIndexable		  ifTrue: [ self _pretenured_2850078_readNextRecordAsArray ]		  ifFalse: [ self readNextRecordAsObject ]

_pretenured_2850078_readNextRecordAsArray	fieldAccessors ifNotNil: [		self fieldCount: (fieldAccessors count: [ :each | each notNil ]) ].	^ fieldCount		  ifNil: [				  | record |				  record := self readFirstRecord.				  self fieldCount: record size.				  record ]		  ifNotNil: [ self _pretenured_2850078_readNextRecord ]

_pretenured_2850078_readNextRecord	| record |	record := self recordClassNew: fieldCount.	fieldAccessors		ifNil: [			self _pretenured_2850078_readNextRecordWithoutFieldAccessors:				record ]		ifNotNil: [ self readNextRecordWithFieldAccessors: record ].	self handleEndOfRecord.	^ record

_pretenured_2850078_readNextRecordWithoutFieldAccessors: record	1 to: fieldCount do: [ :each |			record at: each put: self _pretenured_2850078_readField.			each = fieldCount ifFalse: [ self handleSeparator ] ]

_pretenured_2850078_readField	| field |	field := self peekQuote		         ifTrue: [ self readQuotedField ]		         ifFalse: [ self _pretenured_2850078_readUnquotedField ].	(field ~= emptyFieldValue and: [ emptyFieldInput notNil ]) ifTrue: [		(emptyFieldInput value: field) ifTrue: [ ^ emptyFieldValue ] ].	^ field

_pretenured_2850078_readUnquotedField	(self atEnd or: [ self peekSeparator or: [ self peekEndOfLine ] ])		ifTrue: [ ^ emptyFieldValue ].	^ self _pretenured_2850078_stringStreamContents: [ :stream |			  [			  self atEnd or: [ self peekSeparator or: [ self peekEndOfLine ] ] ]				  whileFalse: [ stream nextPut: self nextChar ] ]

_pretenured_2850078_stringStreamContents: block	"Like String streamContents: block	but reusing the underlying buffer for improved efficiency"	stringStream ifNil: [ stringStream := (String new: 32) writeStream ].	stringStream reset.	block value: stringStream.	^ stringStream _pretenured_2850078_contents
_pretenured_2850078_contents	readLimit := readLimit max: position.	^ collection _pretenured_2850078_copyFrom: 1 to: position

_pretenured_2850078_copyFrom: start to: stop	"Answer a copy of a subset of the receiver, starting from element at	index start until element at index stop."	| newSize |	newSize := stop - start + 1.	^ (self species newTenured: newSize)		  replaceFrom: 1		  to: newSize		  with: self		  startingAt: start

newTenured: sizeRequested	"Return a new instance with the number of indexable variables specified by the argument."	^ self == String		  ifTrue: [ ByteString new: sizeRequested ]		  ifFalse: [ self basicNewTenured: sizeRequested ]

_pretenured_670896223_next	"Read the next record.	I will return an instance of recordClass."	^ recordClassIsIndexable		  ifTrue: [ self _pretenured_670896223_readNextRecordAsArray ]		  ifFalse: [ self readNextRecordAsObject ]

_pretenured_670896223_readNextRecordAsArray	fieldAccessors ifNotNil: [		self fieldCount: (fieldAccessors count: [ :each | each notNil ]) ].	^ fieldCount		  ifNil: [				  | record |				  record := self readFirstRecord.				  self fieldCount: record size.				  record ]		  ifNotNil: [ self _pretenured_670896223_readNextRecord ]

_pretenured_670896223_readNextRecord	| record |	record := self _pretenured_670896223_recordClassNew: fieldCount.	fieldAccessors		ifNil: [ self readNextRecordWithoutFieldAccessors: record ]		ifNotNil: [ self readNextRecordWithFieldAccessors: record ].	self handleEndOfRecord.	^ record
readOnlyRowsWith: aReader	rows := OrderedCollection new.	[ aReader atEnd ] whileFalse: [		rows add: aReader _pretenured_670896223_next ]
